# PartnerIntegration

> Integration provided by a partner (model, tool, data source, etc.)

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| id | uuid | yes | auto | Primary key |

| status | active \| inactive \| pending-review | yes | pending-review | Integration status |
| endpointUrl | string | yes | - | Integration endpoint URL |
